Grievance Portal
Home / Awarded Contracts
Transparency · OCDS

Awarded Contracts

Contracts awarded by Jigawa State ministries, departments and agencies are disclosed in consolidated monthly and quarterly reports, in line with the Open Contracting Data Standard (OCDS).

How disclosures are published — Each report consolidates all contracts awarded in a given month or quarter into a single downloadable file. Reports from previous years are moved to the Bureau Archives.
2ND QUATER CONTRACTS AWARD BY HEALTH AND BASIC EDUCATION
Q2 2026 PDF
Download
2ND QUATER 2026 CONTRACTS AWARD BY ALL MDAs
Q2 2026 PDF
Download
Bureau Archives

Previous years' reports

3 contract-award reports from prior years are preserved in the archive, organised by year.

Browse the archive →

Promoting transparency and accountability in public procurement across Jigawa State since 2012.
